summary: 🌿 Your cosy retreat in Kashubia – relax surrounded by nature all year round 🏡
descriptionIntro: 👋 Welcome to our cosy, year-round cottage in Zbychowo, Kashubia. The cottage sleeps up to 6 guests and is the perfect getaway for a family holiday, a romantic weekend for two, or an active break surrounded by the beautiful Kashubian countryside.
descriptionAmenities: ✨ The cottage is fully equipped with a functional kitchen, bathroom with shower, washing machine, TV, Wi-Fi, and board games for evening entertainment. ♿ The property is wheelchair accessible. 🌱 We care about the environment – the cottage is powered by solar panels and a heat pump.
descriptionActivities: 🛁 On site you will find an outdoor hot tub, electric BBQ, spacious terrace, and garden. 🚲 Guests have access to electric and gravel bikes as well as a kayak. 🌲 Nearby you can explore scenic hiking and cycling trails, lakes, forests, and family-friendly attractions including water sports.
contact: 📬 Email or call us to inquire about availability and price:

cennikSummerRule: ☀️ During the summer holidays, rentals are Saturday-to-Saturday only.
